---
title: "Full Stack Development"
subtitle: "End-to-End Data Solutions"
---

## Executive Summary: The Complete Pipeline

While the other sections of this portfolio focus on specific technical steps, the **Full Stack** project represents a complete data science lifecycle. This project covers:

* **Ingestion & Cleansing:** Handling raw data sources.
* **EDA:** Identifying key drivers through visualization.
* **Modeling:** Implementing machine learning for actionable insights.
* **Deployment:** Communicating results through a structured executive report.

[**View the Full Executive Summary Report →**](./Full_Stack/project1.qmd)
